childMarkdownRemark.html:
Hi, my name is Nicolas Fabre.

I started to get into programming after finishing my master’s degree in geography and working in Aix-en-Provence, France, at the regional planning and urbanism institute as a cartographic engineer.

After free-lancing for few months with the folks at OhMyDevs!, I decided to look for an experience in a company that would present me with new challenges to overcome.

I interned & worked at Boaterfly to work on its web application for a boat rental marketplace.

I then started to work on projects for Boaterfly’s parent company, Dream Yacht Charter. There I built a search engine for boat rentals 🔍⛵️.

Today I can be found in Helsinki, working on the RELEX Workforce optimization software, using Elixir with Phoenix, NodeJS and React among others.

ℹ️ More Information

In my free time I enjoy reading about creative coding, data visualizations and software architecture, and going on all kind of outdoor adventures ! 🌲

📬 Drop me a line !

You can contact me @nfabredev on Twitter.
